description_long: This is a single-bladed axe with a robust wooden handle wrapped in a series of dark leather straps for enhanced grip and durability. The handle is cylindrical and straight, with a slightly tapered end, and features a crisscross pattern of leather bindings along its length. The axe head is metallic, with a broad, slightly curved cutting edge and a flat poll on the opposite side, suitable for both chopping and hammering tasks. The blade is securely mounted to the handle with visible metal bands and a cross-brace at the top, suggesting a traditional wedged mounting style. The lower portion of the handle is more densely wrapped, likely to provide extra grip and shock absorption. No visible markings, engravings, or brand labels are present on the axe.
description: A robust, single-bladed axe with a straight wooden handle wrapped in dark leather straps and a broad metallic blade securely mounted at the top.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from a front angle, highlighting the broad metallic blade and the crisscross leather bindings along the wooden handle.
description_view_1: A side view of the axe, showing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle with visible leather straps.
description_view_2: The back view displays the flat poll of the axe head and the dense leather wrapping on the lower handle.
description_view_3: A direct side view emphasizing the straightness of the handle, the secure mounting of the blade, and the layered leather grip.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle, wrapped with crisscrossed leather straps for grip, slightly tapered at the end, round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad steel blade with a slightly curved cutting edge and a flat poll, no beard, functional and undecorated.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible metal bands and cross-brace securing the blade to the handle.
